mnemonics.title: Hyperparameter Optimization
mnemonics.content: Grid Search, Random Search, Bayesian Optimization

acronyms.usage: A type of neural network commonly used for image classification tasks.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a grid of hyperparameters, with each cell representing a possible combination. The goal is to find the optimal combination that results in the best performance of the CNN model.

analogies.analogy: Finding the optimal combination of hyperparameters is like finding the perfect recipe for a cake. You need to try different combinations of ingredients and cooking times to find the one that results in the best-tasting cake.
